seo_title: Cozy Cactus | Family-Friendly Vacation Rental in Indio with Pool
seo_description: Family vacation rental in Indio with pool, hot tub, full infant gear kit, and a labeled-everything kitchen. 3BR, sleeps 8. Book direct, save 15%.
tagline: Where parents finally rest on vacation.
description_heading: The house where the whole family finally exhales.
description_p1: "It's the first time we have truly rested during our vacation with our 3 children." That mom rebooked before checkout. The same feeling shows up in different words across 146 stays.
description_p2: Pack-n-play in the family amenities closet, ready when you need it. Sound machines in both kids' rooms. The labeled drawer system guests mention in almost every review is exactly what it sounds like: snack drawer has snacks, junk drawer has no junk. Stokke high chair at the kitchen counter. Coffee bar loaded and ready, because toddlers do not believe in sleeping in.
description_p3: Three bedrooms, two bathrooms, sleeps eight. Turquoise and coral run through every room. Community pool steps away for afternoons when the yard isn't enough. Private hot tub that comes into its own after 9pm, when the kids are finally down. Full kitchen, putting green in the backyard, board games that actually get used.
description_p4: Bunk beds in the kids' room. A toy collection with real range: art supplies, books, outdoor gear. The details that make you say, we should just stay one more night. Kids start asking when you are coming back before you have loaded the car.
